PostToolUse._comment: After git commits, remind to persist decisions/learnings to corvia knowledge base.
Record tool completion for session history.

hooks.command: echo 'REMINDER: Have you called corvia_search or corvia_ask first? Per CLAUDE.md, you MUST query corvia MCP tools before using Grep/Glob for any new task or question. If you already called corvia this session, proceed.'

PreToolUse._comment: Record tool invocation start for session history.

UserPromptSubmit._comment: Record user prompts for session history.

SessionEnd._comment: WORKAROUND: Claude Code leaks memory via orphaned node processes in WSL. Kills orphans on session exit. Remove when upstream fix lands: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues
Finalize session log: write session_end, gzip, trigger ingest.

SessionStart._comment: Display-only reminder for agent identity selection. Does not block or require input.
Initialize session recording: create JSONL log with session_start event.
